meaning: adj.被猎犬所追赶的,[建] 层列的
examples: The tears coursed down her cheeks.
The deer coursed the open field.
Thee deer coursed the open field.
Fear coursed through me as I nibbled on breadsticks, protesting a lack of appetite.
My haves vs. have nots theory was brought home as we coursed through Bordeaux this past weekend.
